One bug fix for a v2.0.0 regression. Just update the container; your config is untouched.

### Fixed

- **"Open With..." dialog was completely empty (#22).** Right-clicking a file and choosing an application — or opening a text file, which should offer Kate — showed an empty application list and an empty entry field, so no program could be selected at all. Root cause: KDE's application picker reads a binary service cache (KSycoca), not the installed `.desktop` files directly. On a full KDE Plasma desktop that cache is built automatically at session start; this container runs a minimal openbox session instead, and after the v2.0.0 base migration nothing guaranteed the cache was ever built before you first used "Open With...". The container now builds the cache itself on every start (a fast no-op when nothing changed), so the picker always lists Kate and every other installed application. The startup log gains a diagnostic line showing the cache status.
